chapters.title: Number System
key_facts: Whole numbers include 0; natural numbers start from 1
HCF is the largest common factor
LCM is the smallest common multiple
HCF × LCM = Product of two numbers
chapters.hero_hook: Why do cicadas emerge every 13 or 17 years? — Prime numbers in nature

chapters.title: Geometry — Lines and Angles
key_facts: Sum of angles in a triangle = 180°
Angles on a straight line sum to 180°
Corresponding angles on parallel lines are equal
chapters.hero_hook: The invisible geometry that architects use to build earthquake-proof structures

chapters.title: Algebra — Introduction
key_facts: A variable represents an unknown quantity
Both sides of an equation must be balanced equally
chapters.hero_hook: Al-Khwarizmi: the 9th-century mathematician who invented algebra

chapters.title: Ratio and Proportion
chapters.hero_hook: How the Golden Ratio appears in sunflowers, galaxies, and the Parthenon

chapters.title: Exponents and Powers
chapters.hero_hook: Counting atoms: the only way to write 602,214,076,000,000,000,000,000 in short

chapters.title: Quadratic Equations
key_facts: D>0: two real roots, D=0: one root, D<0: no real roots
chapters.hero_hook: How a parabola traces the path of every thrown ball, rocket, and satellite dish

chapters.title: Pythagoras Theorem
key_facts: a² + b² = c² in a right-angled triangle
Converse: if a²+b²=c², the triangle is right-angled
Used in navigation, construction, and GPS
chapters.hero_hook: The ancient secret that builders used to make perfect right angles before rulers were invented

chapters.title: Mensuration
key_facts: Euler's formula for polyhedra: V - E + F = 2
chapters.hero_hook: Archimedes figured out the volume of a king's gold crown using a bathtub

chapters.title: Coordinate Geometry
chapters.hero_hook: How GPS uses coordinate geometry to pinpoint your location within 3 metres

chapters.title: Trigonometry
chapters.hero_hook: How ancient astronomers measured the distance to the Moon without leaving Earth

chapters.title: Statistics and Probability
chapters.hero_hook: How Bayes' Theorem is used to detect cancer, filter spam, and predict elections

chapters.title: Circle Theorems
key_facts: Tangent perpendicular to radius at point of contact
Opposite angles of cyclic quadrilateral sum to 180°
chapters.hero_hook: How the ancient Greeks discovered that every triangle fits perfectly inside a circle

chapters.title: Calculus Foundations
chapters.hero_hook: Newton invented calculus in 2 years while hiding from the plague — and it changed everything
